data.content: Rejected plan review. The current plan still misses additive preservation in scripts/agent-wizard.sh: its writer still serializes empty pools and its action remap flow still defaults to the first agent, so rerunning it to add a model can still wipe existing dispatch config. The parser and writer scope also omits agents provider, flavor, and version fields from smol-toml settings, so reruns would strip existing agent metadata. Finally, the plan does not cover the large-list model picker path that goes through model-picker.sh, so providers with many models would not show current registrations or duplicate-safe additive selection. Revise the plan to make both setup.sh and agent-wizard.sh preserve current mappings and pools by default, round-trip full agent metadata, and add interactive tests that cover advanced dispatch plus the search-picker path.
